conservative.name: Final Words
conservative.requirements: 6 power. Your target must be the corpse of a creature that had a soul (e.g. it cannot be a daemon or undead). The target must have died within close range of your during this encounter

success.description: You conjure up the spirit of the deceased and may ask it any 1 question. The spirit is not compelled to answer truthfully, but it cannot move on to Morr's realm until it gives you a reply. This spell does not confer any special comprehension to either you or the spirit - if you do not share a language, communication will be difficult!

boon.description: You are able to comprehend and communicate with the spirit regardless of the languages it knew in life

sigmarsComet.description: The spirit stays until it chooses to leave or dismiss it; it can answer multiple questions if it so desires, but cannot leave the place where it died

reckless.name: Final Words
reckless.requirements: 6 power. Your target must be the corpse of a creature that had a soul (e.g. it cannot be a daemon or undead). The target must have dried within close range of you during this encounter

success.description: You conjure up the spirit of the deceased and may ask it any 1 question. The spirit is not compelled to answer truthfully, but it cannot move on to Morr's realm until it gives you a reply. This spell does not confer any special comprehension to either you or the spirit - if you do not share a language, communication will be difficult!

boon.description: You are able to comprehend and communicate with the spirit regardless of the languages it knew in life

chaosStar.description: You are compelled to do a service for the spirit before it answers (GM's choice)

sigmarsComet.description: The spirit is compelled to answer truthfully, to the best of its knowledge
